penalties.description: Task appears incomplete - no clear completion visible with suture cut inside trainer.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion. Claude identified incomplete task with no clear completion visible, while GPT-4o reported full completion in 95 seconds. Given the fundamental requirement that both suture ends must be cut inside the trainer for task completion, and Claude's specific observation that this completion state was not clearly visible, the incomplete task assessment takes precedence. The presence of title cards at the end suggests this may be a demonstration rather than a complete timed performance.
